signInPrompt: Sign in to view and edit your profile.

guestData.title: Delete Guest Data
guestData.prompt: Choose what to do with your picks:

language.hint: Language for the app and emails. Leave on Automatic to use your browser settings.

picture.gravatarHint: Or use <gravatar>Gravatar</gravatar> — set a photo once and it shows up wherever your email is recognized. Your email is hashed before lookup and never exposed to other users.
picture.uploadedHint: You have an uploaded photo. Remove it to use Gravatar.

emails.loginTitle: Receive magic links at this address
emails.calendarTitle: Receive cleanup invites at this address
emails.verificationSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
emails.alreadyYours: This email is already on your account.
emails.mergeSent: Merge request sent! The account owner must confirm via email.

calendar.hint: Keep your personal calendar in sync with the cleanups you join. Subscribe once and updates appear automatically — the first time you pull the feed we'll silently turn off the calendar emails above. Re-tick any email to start receiving invites again.
calendar.instructions: Add the link in Google Calendar → Other calendars → From URL, Apple Calendar → File → New Calendar Subscription, or Outlook → Add calendar → Subscribe from web.

merge.title: Email belongs to another account
merge.body: This email belongs to account ‘{{nickname}}’. Adding it will send them a merge request. If they confirm, their data merges into yours and their account is deleted.

removeLastEmail.title: Remove last email
removeLastEmail.body: This is your only email address. Removing it will de-authenticate your account. Choose what to do with your data:

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.body: This action cannot be undone. Choose what to do with your data:
